message:
test(fuse_e2e): add FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX E2E coverage (bd-4qb1o)

Add mounted-path E2E test for the policy-ex ioctl:

- fuse_ioctl_ext4_get_encryption_policy_ex_returns_v1_policy_on_mounted_path

Test verifies that GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX correctly returns v1 policy
data with proper size field and policy bytes through the FUSE ioctl path.

Also adds:
- FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX_CMD constant (0xC016_6616)
- ext4_get_encryption_policy_ex_ioctl() Python helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
